scripts.build:mobile: pnpm run build:portable && vite build --config mobile/vite.config.ts && node mobile/package.mjs
scripts.build:launcher: pnpm run build:mobile && node launcher/prepare.mjs && dotnet publish launcher/FanoronaLauncher.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -o work/launcher-publish && node launcher/finalize.mjs
scripts.build:apk: pnpm run build:mobile && node android/prepare.mjs && node android/build.mjs && node android/finalize.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs && tsx --test tests/fanorona.test.ts tests/draughts.test.ts tests/morris.test.ts tests/i18n.test.ts tests/presentation.test.ts
